creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Use recvmmsg:           no
    Use SO_REUSEPORT(_LB):  yes
    XDP support:            no
    DoQ support:            yes
    Socket polling:         kqueue
    Atomic support:         C11
    Memory allocator:       auto

Build net/libngtcp2 with my patch:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=281038#c4
